# SED(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  sed — stream editor for filtering and transforming text

## SYNOPSIS
  sed 's/pattern/replacement/[flags]' [file]

## DESCRIPTION
Applies editing operations to text streams or files.

## FLAGS
  g  global replacement (all occurrences)
  i  case-insensitive match

## EXAMPLES
  sed 's/ghost/GHOST/g' /etc/passwd
  cat config.txt | sed 's/password=.*/password=REDACTED/'
  sed -n '5,10p' logfile.txt

## SEE ALSO
  awk, grep, cut
